name: Strata AI Underwriter
description: Autonomous, deterministic credit-underwriting agent for RWA issuer-default risk on Mantle. Continuously re-underwrites ERC-3643 issuers, prices risk on-chain (submitScore -> reprice), and flags distress for human 2-of-3 confirmation. The AI proposes; humans dispose on irreversible/legal actions.

services.description: Per-epoch PD scorecard + GLM-4.6 credit memo over IssuerSignals; deterministic (temp 0, seed 42) and reproducible.
On-chain Turing benchmark: AI arm vs sentiment-blind rules-based baseline, resolved against ground truth. Reputation accrues only from correct, timely calls.

note: Reference ERC-8004 registration for the Mantle Sepolia testnet demo. The on-chain StrataAIAgent contract address is the source of truth; see deployments/mantleSepolia.json.
